data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Slams Biden's Crypto Policies As 'Incredibly Destructive' While Aligning With Trump — Looking For A Pardon?
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, who is currently serving a 25-year sentence for the FTX scam, shared his disapproval of the previous  Joe Biden administration and expressed sympathy toward President Donald Trump, according to an interview from his prison released Thursday.

Alibaba, Rivian, Nu Holdings, Walmart, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Thursday, February 20, 2025 BABA, RIVN, NU, WMT, TSLA stocks  were seen trending among investors.

data.title: Alibaba CFO Toby Xu Touts 5% Drop In Share Count Thanks To Aggressive Buybacks As Jack Ma-Founded Company Basks In Stellar Q3 Results
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has achieved a significant 5% reduction in share count over the past nine months through aggressive buyback initiatives, demonstrating strong capital return commitment amid robust financial performance.

data.title: Apple Stock Has Run Up Over 10% In A Month, Jim Cramer Says iPhone Maker Is 'Ramping' And The Credit Goes To Chinese Subsidies
data.description: Apple Inc. shares have gained over 10% in the past month, with CNBC's Jim Cramer attributing recent momentum to Chinese government subsidies covering Apple products.
